ValidationRule.description: Cannot create SFDC Accounts in SFDC - Need to create them in EBX via integration. Only admin and sap webmethods connector user can create. Ticket # INC0305096.
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_ACCOUNT_006: MDM requires creating a new Account to be performed through the button ('New') found on the upper right of any Account list view (OR from your Account "Smart Search" tab)
